_comment: Vendor Configuration Template - Use this as a base for adding new vendors
_instructions: 1. Copy this template, 2. Fill in all required fields, 3. Remove fields starting with underscore, 4. Import to n8n vendor_config table
_vendor_id_note: Format: vendor_001, vendor_002, etc. Must be unique across all vendors
_vendor_name_note: Human-readable company name for reports and UI
_data_source_type_note: Choose ONE: 'drive' (Google Drive), 'dropbox' (Dropbox), 'sheets' (Google Sheets), 'shopify' (Shopify store), 'website' (custom website)
_source_url_note: Full URL to the data source. Examples below:

credentials._note: Credentials structure varies by data_source_type. Use appropriate format below. MUST BE ENCRYPTED in n8n!
credentials._or_null: Set to null if using shared credentials or public access

_last_sync_date_note: Leave as null for new vendors. Will be automatically updated after first sync. Format: ISO 8601 DateTime
_sync_status_note: Valid values: 'pending', 'in_progress', 'success', 'failed'. Use 'pending' for new vendors
_tier_used_note: Must be 1, 2, or 3. Should match data_source_type: drive/dropbox/sheets=1, shopify=2, website=3

_tier_definitions.1: Direct integrations (Google Drive, Dropbox, Google Sheets) - FREE
_tier_definitions.3: Zyte API + Gemini AI scraping - USAGE-BASED COST (~$0.002 per product)

notes: Additional notes about this vendor, special handling requirements, contact information, etc.
_notes_examples: Products organized by category in subfolders
Sync only on weekends due to rate limits
Images in /images folder, videos in /videos folder
